betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Electric Arc Furnace§f is a powerful smelting device using §belectrical arcs§f for high-temperature metallurgy.

§eAdvantages:§f
• Much faster than standard furnaces
• Can process materials requiring higher temperatures
• More efficient fuel-to-heat conversion

§eOperation:§f
• Requires significant power input
• Accepts ores and raw materials
• Outputs ingots and processed metals

§aTip:§f Essential upgrade from vanilla furnaces for industrial-scale smelting.
